title: Justin's Meeting Notes
raw_body:
Justin Harmon has shared notes from Justin's Meeting Notes, Nov 10 . Tiana Awerbuch and Sam discussed resolving a missing item in a merchant agreement, with Sam suggesting direct contact. Mario Madaffari reported that Tracy identified a cash handling issue at Methuen, which they aim to replicate across locations. Tiana mentioned ongoing issues with the new cash drawer experience and the need for remote training. Sam noted Barb Grimsley's effective cash handling at Methuen. Mario proposed using a dummy employee for multiple bartenders but was advised against it due to accountability issues. Mario also followed up on freight tracking and alphanumeric loyalty codes, with Tiana planning to loop in Davis and Jay for further action.
